title: World Junior Championships 2026 Player Eligibility Announced
indian_angle: This news details the eligibility criteria for Indian players aspiring to represent the nation at the prestigious BWF World Junior Championships in Cairo.
summary: BAI has released the player eligibility guidelines for the upcoming BWF World Junior Championships 2026, to be held in Cairo, Egypt.

title: Delhi World Championships 2026 Needs Gen Z, Gen Alpha Fans
indian_angle: With India hosting the World Championships in Delhi, there's a focus on attracting younger generations of fans to boost the sport's popularity domestically.
summary: As Delhi prepares to host the BWF World Championships 2026, discussions are ongoing about how to engage younger audiences, specifically Gen Z and Gen Alpha, to ensure the sport's future growth in India.

title: BAI President Addresses Monkey Incident at India Open
indian_angle: BAI President Himanta Biswa Sarma commented on an unusual incident involving monkeys during the India Open, highlighting a unique aspect of hosting tournaments in India.
summary: BAI President Himanta Biswa Sarma humorously addressed the presence of monkeys at the India Open, stating, 'What is the problem if monkeys come to watch a game,' following a recent incident.

title: 3x15 Scoring System Implemented in Domestic Tournaments
indian_angle: The Badminton Association of India has implemented a new 3x15 scoring system for domestic ranking tournaments and national championships across U-13, U-15, and U-17 age groups.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has officially implemented the 3x15 scoring system for all domestic ranking tournaments and national championships for junior age categories (U-13, U-15 & U-17).

title: Kidambi Srikanth Reaches US Open Final, Falls Short
indian_angle: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth made a strong run to the US Open final, showcasing his continued presence at the top international level.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open but was unable to clinch the title, faltering at the last step against Su Li Yang.

title: Rounak Chouhan Upsets World No 6 at US Open
indian_angle: Young Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan caused a major upset at the US Open by defeating World No. 6 Chou Tien Chen, signaling a rising talent.
summary: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan, a self-proclaimed Cristiano Ronaldo fan, delivered a stunning performance at the US Open by defeating World No. 6 Chou Tien Chen.
